suite.name: Get House Data

test.name: TC01 - Get house data success

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=potter_api, url=https://potterapi-fedeperin.vercel.app, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://potterapi-fedeperin.vercel.app/en/houses?index=3 path_url=/en/houses?index=3 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None

/Users/thipwara/Documents/ascend_project/venv/lib/python3.9/site-packages/urllib3/connectionpool.py:1097: InsecureRequestWarning: Unverified HTTPS request is being made to host 'potterapi-fedeperin.vercel.app'. Adding certificate verification is strongly advised. See: https://urllib3.readthedocs.io/en/latest/advanced-usage.html#tls-warnings warnings.warn(
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.
